description: Firm Hedge Execution Planner - turns the Tail Hedge Overlay sleeve into a worked order ticket. Tracks the standing sleeve, emits the rebalance delta (open/add/trim/roll/switch/harvest), regime-gated with pre-trade checks. data/hedge-planner.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Firm Hedge Execution Planner - daily 05:00 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, after the Tail Hedge Overlay (04:30), so it always plans against a fresh sleeve target.
